title: MedPanel Consultation Session
description: Complete consultation lifecycle: question -> classification -> evidence -> specialist discussion -> synthesis -> output. All enums via $ref to shared-definitions.json. Missing fields from schema audit added. Budget ceiling uses tiered pricing.

user_id.description: References the user. Was missing from previous schema (audit item 1d).

classification.description: Output of the classification agent (Haiku). Schema matches classification-output.json.

evidence_package.description: Output of evidence retrieval pipeline. Full schema in evidence-package.json.

specialist_outputs.description: Array of all agent outputs across all rounds. Each agent produces one output per round.

total_cost_usd.description: Actual total cost. Validated against budget_tier.max_cost_usd.

budget_tier.description: Tiered pricing replaces flat $5 ceiling. Simple ($5), Moderate ($15), Complex ($25) based on complexity score.

max_cost_usd.description: Budget ceiling for this tier: simple=5.00, moderate=15.00, complex=25.00

models_used.description: Map of role to model version (e.g., {'classifier': 'claude-haiku-4-5', 'endocrinologist': 'claude-opus-4-6'})

synthesis.description: Moderator agent's compiled output. Full schema in synthesis-output.json.

output_patient_mode.description: Rendered patient-facing output (5th-6th grade reading level per PRODUCT-POSITIONING.md, Flesch-Kincaid 60-70)

output_physician_mode.description: Rendered physician-facing output (clinical language, GRADE ratings, citations)

consensus_reached.description: Top-level flag for SQL alignment. Was missing from previous schema.

profile_completeness_score.description: Patient profile completeness from score_completeness(). Was missing from previous schema.

quality_metrics.description: Discussion quality metrics. Was missing from previous schema.

value_added_score.description: Multi-agent vs single-agent value ratio. > 1.15 = justified.

diversity_score.description: 1 - average pairwise agent output similarity. < 0.30 = agents are redundant.

information_gain_per_round.description: Information gain for each round (0.0-1.0). Below 0.05 triggers termination.

summary_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the synthesis output for reproducibility tracking. Was missing from previous schema.

outcome_tracking.description: Per-recommendation outcome tracking. Changed from flat object to array for SQL alignment.

recommendation_id.description: References a recommendation ID from specialist_outputs

adherence.description: Did the user follow the recommendation?

alternative_chosen.description: If chose_different_approach, what did they do instead?

confounders.description: Factors that may have influenced the outcome besides the recommendation

followup_schedule.description: Scheduled follow-up checkpoints. Was missing from previous schema (audit: followup_schedule table).

deferred_concerns.description: New concerns raised in Round 3 that were deferred. Flagged for future consultations.
